title: Going Through Everything
knowledge_note: The Quran says each soul will see exactly what it did — nothing missed, nothing added. A for each loop ensures every item is visited.
explanation: A 'for each' loop goes through every item in a bag one by one. Each time the loop runs, the item variable holds the current item.
challenge: Make your own bag of 3 things and loop through them.
hint: Create remember things = bag["...", "...", "..."] with your own items.
